mnemonic:
glass [glɑ: s]
glasses ['ɡlɑ:sɪz] - очки
***
Через СТЕКЛО увидел глаз. (это) glass
В СТАКАНЕ он увидел глаз. (это) glass
***
Возьми стакан "glass",
отнеси его в класс "class".

examples.eng: a big glass of soda
I poured him a glass of water.
Mind the broken glass.
a glass of milk and a cookie
He heard the smash of glass.
a small glass of soda
She collected old glass.
examples.ru: Она коллекционировала старинные изделия из стекла.

examples.eng: The glass cracked.
Fill the glass with ice.
a large glass of water
Venetian glass
She poured a glass of wine.
Be careful with that glass.
I need a new pair of glasses.
She drank two glasses of water.
The glass flew into pieces.
A glass of house red, please.
examples.ru: Стакан красного вина из бочки, пожалуйста.

examples.eng: She filled the glass and drank.
The waiter filled our glasses with water.
Set the glass on a coaster.
May I fill your glass for you?
That wet glass will mark the table.
examples.ru: Этот мокрый стакан оставит след на столе.

examples.eng: Keep a glass of water within reach.
He took a long drink from his glass.
examples.ru: Он сделал большой глоток из своего стакана.

examples.eng: The wine glass shattered
a glass brimful of red wine
examples.ru: наполненный до краёв бокал красного вина

examples.eng: soda pop fizzing in the glass
The soda foamed in the glass.
The ice tinkled in the glass.
a cold brew in a frosty glass
